name: Biosearch, S.A.
summary: Biosearch, S.A. is a biotechnology company based in Spain, focused on the research, development, and commercialization of ingredients and products for the pharmaceutical, nutraceutical, and functional food sectors. The company develops and markets products containing probiotics, omega-3 fatty acids, and other functional ingredients, with headquarters in Granada. Biosearch aims to improve human health and well-being through innovation.
